ideation: This animation sequence expresses a somber, reflective mood using the "black heart" emoji. It starts with arms crossed tightly over the chest, then slowly opens to a position of slight vulnerability before returning to the initial crossed-arm pose. The movements are deliberate and slow, mirroring the emotional weight of the emoji. Frame 1: Arms are tightly crossed over the chest. This conveys defensiveness or sadness. Frame 2: Arms begin to open, but still remain close to the body. This shows a slight relaxation of the initial defensive posture, suggesting a moment of vulnerability. Frame 3: The arms are slightly open to the sides, palms facing inward. This reveals a brief glimpse of openness before returning to the guarded state. Frame 4: Arms start to return to the initial crossed position. Frame 5: Arms are back to the tightly crossed position, reflecting the return to a reserved emotional state.

frames.beat: arms cross tightly over chest, a heavy heart
arms begin to open, a moment of vulnerability
arms open slightly to the sides, revealing inner feelings
arms start to close, retreating inward again
arms cross tightly, embracing the sadness
